subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My Glory! Thy letter hath come into Our presence and been witnessed through the effulgent rays of the Luminary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی عریضه شما حاضر و بتجلیات انوار نیر مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
